lifecycle.name: User login
lifecycle.expected: User should authenticate

lifecycle.name: Admin login
lifecycle.expected: Admin should authenticate

lifecycle.name: User placed COD order
lifecycle.expected: COD order should be created

lifecycle.name: User placed Online (Prepaid) order
lifecycle.expected: Online order should be created

lifecycle.name: Database order creation state
lifecycle.expected: Both orders should start as Pending + payment Pending

lifecycle.name: Admin confirmed both orders
lifecycle.expected: Admin should move both orders to Confirmed

lifecycle.name: Online prepaid payment processed
lifecycle.expected: Webhook should mark payment as Paid in Payment + Order collections

lifecycle.name: COD status: Confirmed -> Packed
lifecycle.expected: Packed transition should succeed

lifecycle.name: COD status: Packed -> Shipped (with shipment)
lifecycle.expected: Shipment API should move to Shipped and persist AWB/tracking fields

lifecycle.name: COD status: Shipped -> Out for Delivery
lifecycle.expected: Out for Delivery transition should succeed

lifecycle.name: COD status: Out for Delivery -> Delivered
lifecycle.expected: Delivered transition should succeed

lifecycle.name: statusHistory timestamps in DB
lifecycle.expected: statusHistory should include each lifecycle status with valid chronological timestamps

lifecycle.name: User requested replacement after delivery
lifecycle.expected: Delivered user order should allow replacement request (within 7 days)

lifecycle.name: Admin approved replacement
lifecycle.expected: Admin should approve replacement request

lifecycle.name: Online order status -> Packed
lifecycle.expected: Packed transition should succeed

lifecycle.name: Online order status -> Shipped
lifecycle.expected: Shipped transition should succeed

lifecycle.name: Online order status -> Out for Delivery
lifecycle.expected: Out for Delivery transition should succeed

lifecycle.name: Online order status -> Delivered
lifecycle.expected: Delivered transition should succeed

lifecycle.name: Online order replacement request
lifecycle.expected: User should be able to request replacement after delivery

lifecycle.name: Admin rejected replacement
lifecycle.expected: Admin should have a working rejection flow for replacement requests

evidence.rejectStatusMessage: "status" must be one of [Pending, Confirmed, Packed, Shipped, Out for Delivery, Delivered, Cancelled, Replacement Requested, Replacement Approved, Replacement Shipped, Replacement Delivered, Returned]

lifecycle.name: Order confirmation email sent to user
lifecycle.expected: User mailbox delivery should be validated externally (provider logs/inbox)
lifecycle.actual: Not directly verifiable via API response; backend logs were captured separately.

edgeCases.name: Duplicate order submission
edgeCases.expected: Same idempotencyKey should be blocked with HTTP 409
edgeCases.actual: HTTP 409: Duplicate request detected. Order is already being processed.

edgeCases.name: COD payment becomes Paid after delivery
edgeCases.expected: COD order paymentStatus should become "Paid" once delivered

edgeCases.name: Courier tracking or shipment data missing
edgeCases.expected: Order should not reach shipped/delivered flow without shipment/AWB data

edgeCases.name: Replacement reject path availability
edgeCases.expected: Replacement rejection should be implemented and reachable
edgeCases.actual: No working route/validation path for rejection

edgeCases.name: User cancelling before shipping
edgeCases.expected: Pending order should be cancellable by user

edgeCases.name: Status transition validation (invalid changes blocked)
edgeCases.actual: HTTP 400: Cannot transition order status from "Pending" to "Delivered"

edgeCases.name: Admin updating status multiple times
edgeCases.expected: Repeated identical status update should be blocked

edgeCases.name: Online payment failure
edgeCases.expected: Failure handler should mark Payment + Order as Failed

edgeCases.name: User requesting replacement after allowed window
edgeCases.expected: Replacement request after 7 days should be blocked
edgeCases.actual: HTTP 400: Replacement can only be requested within 7 days of delivery

edgeCases.name: Email sending failures
edgeCases.expected: Email provider failure path should be tested with a controlled mail transport failure
edgeCases.actual: Not deterministic from API-only run; requires mail provider fault injection/log capture.

verificationPoints.name: Order appears in Admin dashboard
verificationPoints.expected: Both newly created orders should be listed in admin orders

verificationPoints.name: COD order status reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Confirmed"

verificationPoints.name: Online order status reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Confirmed"

verificationPoints.name: COD Packed reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Packed"

verificationPoints.name: COD Shipped reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Shipped"

verificationPoints.name: COD Out for Delivery reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Out for Delivery"
verificationPoints.actual: user=Out for Delivery, admin=Out for Delivery, adminList=Out for Delivery

verificationPoints.name: COD Delivered reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Delivered"

verificationPoints.name: COD Replacement Requested reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Replacement Requested"
verificationPoints.actual: user=Replacement Requested, admin=Replacement Requested, adminList=Replacement Requested

verificationPoints.name: COD Replacement Approved reflected on user/admin pages
verificationPoints.expected: User + Admin detail + Admin list status should be "Replacement Approved"
verificationPoints.actual: user=Replacement Approved, admin=Replacement Approved, adminList=Replacement Approved

verificationPoints.name: Replacement status visible on user order payload
verificationPoints.expected: Order should contain replacement object with updated replacementStatus

verificationPoints.name: Tracking timeline data available to user
verificationPoints.expected: Order payload should expose statusHistory for timeline UI

verificationPoints.name: Database order document updated correctly
verificationPoints.expected: Order document should match lifecycle transitions and replacement state

verificationPoints.name: Shipment or courier fields stored correctly
verificationPoints.expected: Shipment-created order should persist AWB + trackingUrl

verificationPoints.name: Status updates reflect instantly on frontend
verificationPoints.expected: Real-time UI update should be validated via browser session/subscribed socket events
verificationPoints.actual: This CLI run validates API + DB only; frontend live refresh not directly asserted here.

executionNotes: MongoDB connection established for DB-level assertions.
